Our price sheet is intended as a general buying guide, not a guaranteed approval list.
Listed items indicate eligibility, not guaranteed approval. All offers are reviewed individually and subject to approval based on current demand,
quantities, condition, and our purchasing limits at the time the invoice is submitted. Availability and buying status may change at any time.

Remove all stickers and residue before shipping. 
Email your invoice for approval before sending your shipment, and include a copy of the approved invoice inside the package.
Unapproved orders may be rejected or returned at the vendor’s expense.


 -$3 For Boxes with clear tape or labels attached
We are not responsible for damage under labels or damage incured attempting to remove labels

We do not purchase stolen items or products purposely obtained from insurance for the purpose of reselling 

Please ship within 3 days of invoicing.
Orders not shipped within 3 days of invoicing may
be subject to price changes or cancellation
